text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Tracen Academy may be big, but I've never gotten lost.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Why would I? I already had the map from the
campus pamphlets memorized long before I even
started here.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
And now, whenever someone asks me for
directions, I can give them calmly and
promptly. ♪

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Got that? If you're going to be my trainer, you'd
better have this place memorized as well!
